allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; echo "---"; \(Get-Command scoop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== python ==="; \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== python3 ==="; \(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== py ==="; \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== winget ==="; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
